response.original_title: 1985 - A Five Nights at Freddy's Fan Movie
response.overview: After the tragic disappearance of their close friend Gabriel, a group of teenagers break into Henry's, a local car dealership, that they believe may have connections to their missing companion. Unknown to Jeremy, Susie, Fritz, Cassidy and Charlotte however, something undesirable is lurking in the shadows of the warehouse.
